title: The Sunny Escapes Sabaody
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Luffy, Rayleigh, Nami, Franky, Brook. The core story beat is the sunny escapes sabaody.
scene: The scene centers on the sunny escapes sabaody, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Luffy, Rayleigh, Nami, Franky, Brook driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You guys look more manly than ever!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: luffy-san!! I have missed you so much!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoooooo OoAA!!! F...!! F...!! Franky Yyyy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hold that thought, Luffy!! I can't say I understand, but can we leave the awe for later?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We just got word that the battleships are almost on top of us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Chopper! Get over here, he's losing a ton of blood!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...O... D... One gorgeous girl... two gorgeous girls... three gorgeous girls...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uh-oh!! They are already close enough to fire on us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do we fire back?!! This doesn't look good!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The KUja Pirates!!! What do you think you're doing?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Are you trying to obstruct our mission?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ..was so thought- less as to place...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's the emblem of the KUja...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: An all-female pirate crew, led by the shichibukai "pirate empress".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A Shichibuka!?!! Who on Earth is that stunning beauty?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahh!! My eyes!! She shines with an unearthly brightness!! Her beauty knows no end!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WH... why is there a Shichibukai here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aahhhh!:) she... she just winked at us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That was lucky! Come on, let's set sail!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah - I was sent to the Isle of Women, so they're all my pals.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Isle of Women?! The legendary Land of Dreams?! It really exists?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, you'd better. Have been training hard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...do you have any idea?!! Any Idea What I've...?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Wow...! So those are Luffy's friends! They do seem fun!

summary: The Sunny Escapes Sabaody. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
